en: The only smart speaker device designed specifically to be used by the greatest generation.
ko: 위대한 세대를 위해 특별히 설계된 유일한 스마트 스피커입니다.

en: It's super loud and responds to any name even remotely close to Alexa.
ko: 소리가 엄청 크고, 알렉사와 비슷한 이름에 반응합니다.

en: So they can find out the weather.
Allegra, what is the weather outside?
It is 74 degrees and sunny. Huh?
It is 74 degrees and sunny. Where? Outside. What about it?
The temperature outside is 74 degrees and sunny.
Clarissa, how many did old Satchel strike out last night?
ko: 클라리사, 어젯밤에 세차엘이 몇 번 삼진 당했어?

en: Satchel Page is dead. He what now? Died. Who did? Satchel Page. Huh?
ko: 세차엘 페이지는 죽었어요. 뭐라고? 죽었어요. 누가? 세차엘 페이지요. 뭐라고?

en: Anita, what them boys up to across the street?
ko: 아니타, 저쪽 거리의 아이들은 뭐하고 있어?

en: They are just playing. They what now? They are just playing.
ko: 그냥 놀고 있어요. 뭐라고? 그냥 놀고 있어요.

en: You say they just playing now?
